data.text/markdown:
Transport for London — Data Explorer

Data loaded via dlt from the TfL Unified API into DuckDB.

Bike Points by Area

There are ~800 Santander Cycles docking stations across London. Which areas have the most?

Docking Station Capacity

Each bike point has additional_properties — dlt normalised these into a child table. We can extract NbDocks (total capacity) per station.

Major Roads — Current Status

Overview of TfL-managed strategic roads (A2, A4, A40, etc.)

Accident Statistics (2019)

50,626 accident records from TfL, with nested casualties and vehicles tables.

Tube Line Status (Live Snapshot)

Status of Victoria, Circle, Central, and Northern lines at time of data load.

Available Tables

  • accident_stats
  • accident_stats__casualties
  • accident_stats__vehicles
  • active_service_types
  • air_quality
  • bike_point
  • bike_point__additional_properties
  • journey_modes
  • line_by_mode
  • line_by_mode__service_types
  • line_modes
  • line_route
  • line_route__route_sections
  • line_route__service_types
  • line_severity
  • line_status
  • line_status__line_statuses
  • line_status__line_statuses__validity_periods
  • line_status__service_types
  • road
  • stop_point_modes
  • stop_point_types
